title: Xanthan-Infused Slovakian Dark Soy Sauce Tagine
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring the unique pairing of dark soy sauce and xanthan gum, served in a fondue pot.

ingredients.name: xanthan gum
ingredients.notes: infuses the dish with a unique texture and aids in thickening

ingredients.name: beef broth
ingredients.notes: a savory and comforting base for the tagine

ingredients.name: celery
ingredients.notes: adds a fresh and herbal flavor

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: sweet and caramelized, adds depth to the dish

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: a classic addition, enhances the flavors of the other ingredients

instructions: heat the beef broth in a fondue pot over medium heat
add the xanthan gum and whisk until dissolved
add the dark soy sauce, carrots, celery, onion, and garlic to the pot and simmer for 20 minutes
add the potatoes to the pot and continue to simmer for another 10 minutes
season with salt and pepper to taste
serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs
